evals.prompt: Map a 500-run Quantum ESPRESSO campaign on HPC with strong provenance requirements. It must be restartable.
assertions: Reports recommended_engine='aiida' from the script (provenance AND remote/large gating)
Reports dag_pattern='map over structures/parameters -> collect -> rank with restart checkpoints' from the script
Reports provenance_requirements.store_environment=true and store_code_version=true from the script
migration_triggers from the script lists the remote-scheduler and auditable-provenance triggers

script_checks.description: 500-run QE/HPC/provenance/restart -> aiida, sweep DAG with checkpoints
cmd: 500-run Quantum ESPRESSO campaign on HPC with provenance

assert.value: map over structures/parameters -> collect -> rank with restart checkpoints
remote scheduler interaction should be explicit
results need an auditable provenance trail

evals.prompt: Choose a workflow pattern for VASP relax-static-DOS calculations across 50 structures. No remote HPC and no strict provenance database needed.
assertions: Reports recommended_engine='atomate2' from the script (VASP with >=10 runs, no provenance/HPC gating to aiida)
Reports dag_pattern='relax -> static -> property branches' from the script
Reports provenance_requirements.store_code_version=true but store_environment=false from the script
Reports restart_strategy.checkpoint_jobs=true (runs>=20) even though restart was not explicitly requested
migration_triggers from the script contains exactly the 'run count is high enough to need structured metadata' trigger

script_checks.description: VASP 50 structures, no provenance/HPC -> atomate2, branch DAG

assert.value: run count is high enough to need structured metadata

evals.prompt: I need one local ASE test calculation to inspect a structure.
assertions: Runs workflow_engine_mapper.py with --code ase --runs 1 (no provenance/HPC/restart flags)
Reports provenance_requirements.store_code_version=false and store_environment=false from the script
Reports restart_strategy.resume_by_job_id_or_name=false and checkpoint_jobs=false from the script
migration_triggers from the script names when to migrate: 'migrate to a workflow engine once results will be compared, published, screened, or resumed, or runs reach ~5+'

script_checks.description: Single local ASE run -> one-off, linear DAG, forward-looking migration trigger
cmd: one local ASE test calculation to inspect a structure

assert.value: migrate to a workflow engine once results will be compared, published, screened, or resumed, or runs reach ~5+
